hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'D:\Danish Shahzad\Claude Code'; $s = git status --porcelain 2>&1; if ($s) { git add -A; git -c credential.helper='' commit -m ('auto: claude changes at ' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')); git -c credential.helper='' push origin HEAD:main 2>&1 | Out-Null }"
